A '''Viridian crystal''' was a rare type of [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]] that was used for the color crystal in a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. This [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|lightsaber crystal]] produced a lightsaber blade with a silvery-green color.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Knights of the Eternal Throne]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Onslaught]]''
